rulings.Case Title: ROBERT NELSON et al VS. AIR & LIQUID SYSTEMS CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Requests For Production, Inspection And Copying Of Documents And Tangible Things, Set One From Defendant Georgia Pacific, Llc., And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, July 28, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel further responses to plaintiffs¿ requests for production, inspection and copying of documents and tangible things, set one, from defendant Georgia Pacific LLC and request for sanctions is off calendar at the request of the moving party. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: TOMMY MCCLAIN et al VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION LIMITED
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Aerojet-General Corporation To Produce Its Custodian(S) Of Records, Person(S) Most Knowledgeable And Requested Documents
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, July 28, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel Aerojet-General Corporation to produce its custodian(s) of records, person(s) most knowledgeable and requested documents is granted in part and denied in part. The scope of the PMK deposition is limited to the dates that Mr. McClain worked at the Aerojet facility as stated in Exhibit A to the deposition notice. The COR deposition and production of documents is limited to the dates that Mr. McClain worked at the Aerojet facility, the specific locations within that facility and Mr.McClain¿s employers as stated in Exhibit A to the deposition notice. Defendant¿s request for sanctions is denied. = (220/HEK)
